message:
feat(database,tokio-compat): implement GitHub issues #18, #19, #20

Issue #18 — PostgreSQL TLS negotiation:
- Add PgStream enum (Plain/Tls) with AsyncRead/AsyncWrite dispatch
- Implement negotiate_tls() with SSLRequest message and TLS upgrade
- Parse sslmode, application_name, connect_timeout from connection URL
- Feature-gate TLS behind `tls` feature flag (9 tests)

Issue #19 — Tokio runtime context bridge:
- Add with_tokio_context() async fn with Cx cancellation checks
- Add with_tokio_context_sync() for client construction
- Thread-local cached minimal Tokio current-thread runtime
- Enable `rt` feature on tokio dep in tokio-compat crate (5 tests)

Issue #20 — Async connection pool:
- Add AsyncConnectionManager trait with connect/is_valid/disconnect
- Add AsyncDbPool with Cx-aware get(), close(), stats tracking
- Add AsyncPooledConnection with Deref/DerefMut and auto-return (17 tests)

Also includes fmt fix on issue #21 test assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
